Bash(git commit --no-verify -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: PostgreSQL to Convex migration tool

Enterprise-grade CLI tool for migrating PostgreSQL databases to Convex with:

Core Features:
- Schema introspection with multi-schema support
- Type-safe code generation \(queries, mutations, actions, validators\)
- Streaming migration with cursor-based pagination
- Intelligent batch sizing with adaptive rate limiting
- Exponential backoff with jitter for retries

Enterprise Features:
- Rollback capability with pre-migration snapshots
- Parallel table migration with dependency-aware execution
- Metrics aggregation \(throughput, memory, batch stats\)
- Enhanced dry-run with detailed previews
- Connection pool optimization
- Graceful shutdown with state preservation

CLI Features:
- Interactive setup wizard
- Rich progress reporting with colors
- Structured error handling \(ERR-XXX codes\)
- Resumable migrations with checkpointing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
